title: chaetogastra tortuosa
intro: Chaetogastra tortuosa, also known as the twisted stem or sea lavender, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The Chaetogastra tortuosa plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. It offers several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Chaetogastra tortuosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for medicinal purposes.
